title: Neuro Ninjas with Katie - a programme of 6 sessions tailored for primary aged children
subHeading: Neuro Ninjas with Katie – Helping Young Minds Thrive (ages 8 – 11)
description:
I love working with children, helping them understand how their brains work and equipping them with strategies to navigate life's ups and downs. I truly believe that all young people would benefit from this knowledge, and my dream is to bring my programme into local schools so that every child has access to these essential life skills.

I work 1:1 with primary aged children, tailoring each session to their interests and needs. Sessions are structured, practical and fun, designed to help children build confidence, resilience and a deeper understanding of themselves. These skills support them not just now, but for the rest of their lives.

I offer an initial block of six sessions, with the option to extend if needed. To start, I provide a free phone consultation for parents to discuss how I can support your child. This is followed by a free face to face consultation with you and your child.

title: Mind Matters with Katie – a programme of 6 session tailored for secondary aged children
subHeading: Mind Matters with Katie – supporting teens through life’s challenges
description: The teenage years can be tough to navigate, with academic pressure, social challenges and rising anxiety levels in our young people. Mind Matters with Katie is designed to provide secondary-aged students with the tools they need to manage stress, lift their mood and build confidence in themselves. Sessions are relaxed, safe and positive, creating a space where teens can explore strategies to reduce anxiety, improve resilience and feel more in control of their thoughts and emotions. My approach is practical, and solution focused, helping young people develop life skills that will support them now and into adulthood. I offer an initial block of six sessions, with the option to extend if needed. To start, I provide a free phone consultation for parents to discuss how I can support your child.This is followed by a free face to face consultation with you and your child.

title: Solution Focused Hypnotherapy with Katie
description: Life can feel overwhelming at times, with the pressures of work, relationships, and everyday responsibilities taking their toll. Therapy with Katie is here to help you regain balance, build resilience, and feel more in control of your thoughts and emotions. I offer support with: Anxiety & stress management, Low mood & motivation, Confidence & self-belief, Anger management, Overwhelm & burnout, Phobias & fears, Breaking unhelpful habits. Sessions are calm, supportive, and solution-focused, giving you the space to explore practical strategies that help you move forward. My approach is grounded in neuroscience and tailored to your needs, helping you develop tools that support your well-being both now and in the future. Most adults find they make good progress within 6–8 sessions, but you have the flexibility to book a block or pay as you go. To begin, I provide a free phone consultation where we can discuss how I can support you.

title: Walking therapy blends conversation, movement, and nature for healing.
description: Walking therapy is a gentle, effective way to combine the benefits of talking therapy with the healing power of movement and nature. Instead of sitting indoors, we take our sessions outside, walking side by side at a pace that feels comfortable.  For many people, walking makes it easier to talk openly. The natural rhythm of movement can help reduce anxiety, clear the mind, and bring a fresh perspective. Being outdoors also lessens the intensity of eye contact, which some find helps them feel more at ease. Spending time by the sea, in the woods, or in wide open spaces naturally boosts mood, lowers stress, and increases feelings of calm and wellbeing. Living in Clevedon gives us wonderful opportunities to enjoy these landscapes during therapy.  We’ll start with an initial consultation in the studio. After that, you’ll be able to choose from one of several pre-planned local routes, tailored to your fitness levels and preferences—whether that’s a peaceful woodland walk, fresh sea air, or the openness of green spaces. Each step we take becomes part of the therapeutic process, helping you to feel grounded, supported, and more connected with yourself.

title: Holistic massage restores balance to body, mind, and emotions.
description:
Holistic massage is more than easing muscle tension. It is a nurturing, intuitive approach that supports your whole wellbeing — physical, emotional, and mental. I have always deeply believed in the strong connection between body and mind, and how what we experience emotionally is often held within the body. So often, our bodies carry the weight of stress, worry, and emotional strain. Holistic massage creates the space for you to gently release that weight, allowing both body and mind to soften and rebalance. Each session is shaped around what you need in the moment, using a blend of techniques to support relaxation, release, and restoration. There are no set routines or standard sequences — every treatment is as individual as you are. Holistic massage can support you with muscle tension, stress, fatigue, emotional overload, or simply the need to pause and be nurtured. Clients often leave feeling lighter, calmer, and more centred, carrying a sense of ease back into daily life.

Sessions are available in three options:

  • 60 minutes — a deeply relaxing treatment supporting rest and renewal
  • 90 minutes — allowing more time to release tension and fully unwind
  • 2 hours — a deeply immersive experience offering profound relaxation and balance

Whether chosen as a standalone treatment or as part of a wider wellbeing journey,holistic massage offers a calm, supportive space where your body can relax,reset, and restore — reconnecting you with a sense of balance and ease.

Holistic massage is currently offered to women only. Men are welcome by personal or professional referral.

title: 1 hour of Solution Focused Hypnotherapy followed by 1 hour of Holistic Massage
description:
An Integrative Mind–Body Wellbeing Experience

I have always deeply believed in the powerful connection between mind and body — how our thoughts, emotions, and experiences are held not just in the mind, but within the body too. True wellbeing comes when both are supported together. This is where Solution Focused Hypnotherapy and holistic massage blend so naturally. Solution Focused Hypnotherapy gently quietens the mind, creating clarity, calm, and a sense of inner safety. It helps release unhelpful thought patterns, ease mental overload, and guide you into a deeply relaxed state. As the mind softens, the nervous system settles, preparing the body to let go. Holistic massage then deepens this process. Where hypnotherapy works with the mind, massage works with the body — releasing stored tension, stress, and emotional weight held in the muscles and tissues. So often, the body holds onto what the mind has been carrying. Through intuitive, nurturing touch, holistic massage creates the space for the body to fully relax, restore, and rebalance. Together, these therapies work in harmony: the mind is soothed and clarified first, allowing the body to release more deeply. Clients often describe feeling lighter, calmer, and more connected to themselves — as though both mind and body have been given permission to exhale. This integrative wellbeing package offers more than relaxation alone. It supports emotional balance, stress relief, and a deeper sense of peace — helping you reconnect with yourself on every level. You may notice a quieter mind, a softer body, and a renewed sense of clarity and ease that carries gently into everyday life. This is time just for you. A pause. A reset. A chance to nurture both mind and body, together.

This integrative wellbeing package is currently offered to women only. Men are welcome by personal or professional referral.
